halt_reason: Three Tier-1 (submission-blocking) cross-paper mismatches were found during the SIARC-COHERENCE-AUDIT (P-10) relay session. Per the relay prompt's HALT clause, the agent does not auto-edit any submitted paper; instead, three relay patch prompts are produced as deliverables.

tier_1_mismatches.summary: P06 says the F(2,4) Trans-stratum has degree profile (2,2); P11 prop:deg21 and T2B/UMB use degree-(2,1).
T0..T3 labels carry incompatible meanings across UMB (arithmetic) and #14 (obstruction); reader can be misled.

UMB conj:t2b claims c = -2/9 universally for degree-(2,1) PSL2Z trans-stratum, but T2B documents 16 Class B families with a_2/b_1^2 = +1/4. UMB conjecture is literally falsified by its own companion paper.

next_action: Hand the three patch_relay_MM0{1,2,3}.md prompts to subsequent relay sessions. Until those are executed, no new Zenodo version of UMB or P06 should be pushed.
